allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "backend" -Force -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -notmatch "node_modules" } | Select-Object FullName, Mode | Select-Object -First 30)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "backend" -Force -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "^\\.env" -or $_.Name -eq "Server.js" } | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "." -File -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Extension -match "^\\.\(png|jpg|jpeg|webp|gif\)$" -and $_.FullName -notmatch "node_modules" } | Select-Object Name, Length, DirectoryName)
